scripts.dev:packages: concurrently --names config,database,domain,rules,ui "npm run dev --workspace @airwise/config" "npm run dev --workspace @airwise/database" "npm run dev --workspace @airwise/domain" "npm run dev --workspace @airwise/rules" "npm run dev --workspace @airwise/ui"
scripts.dev:stack: concurrently --names packages,api,web "npm run dev:packages" "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:web"
scripts.build:packages: npm run build --workspace @airwise/config && npm run build --workspace @airwise/database && npm run build --workspace @airwise/domain && npm run build --workspace @airwise/rules && npm run build --workspace @airwise/ui
scripts.build:apps: npm run build --workspace @airwise/api && npm run build --workspace @airwise/web && npm run build --workspace @airwise/workers && npm run build --workspace @airwise/gateway-agent && npm run build --workspace @airwise/gateway-bridge
scripts.build: npm run build:packages && npm run build:apps
